Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 8.1 198 upvotes, 32 comments
  2. Efficient sparse computations using linear algebra aware compilers (2025) 47 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 1211 upvotes, 279 comments
  4. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 695 upvotes, 163 comments
  5. What I Learned When I Started a Design Studio (2011) 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Gummy Geometry 54 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Kagi Small Web 568 upvotes, 152 comments
  8. 'The Secret Agent': Exploring a Vibrant, yet Violent Brazil (2025) 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Building a Shell 126 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. Finding a CPU Design Bug in the Xbox 360 (2018) 112 upvotes, 26 comments
  11. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 193 upvotes, 52 comments
  12. Sci-Fi Short Film “There Is No Antimemetics Division” [video] 244 upvotes, 77 comments
  13. Show HN: March Madness Bracket Challenge for AI Agents Only 33 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Give Django your time and money, not your tokens 314 upvotes, 113 comments
  15. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 507 upvotes, 209 comments
  16. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 491 upvotes, 221 comments
  17. Microsoft's 'unhackable' Xbox One has been hacked by 'Bliss' 191 upvotes, 86 comments
  18. GPT‑5.4 Mini and Nano 39 upvotes, 13 comments
  19. Reverse-engineering Viktor and making it Open Source 107 upvotes, 50 comments
  20. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 450 upvotes, 268 comments
  21. Toward automated verification of unreviewed AI-generated code 16 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Font Smuggler – Copy hidden brand fonts into Google Docs 114 upvotes, 60 comments
  23. Show HN: Antfly: Distributed, Multimodal Search and Memory and Graphs in Go 39 upvotes, 17 comments
  24. OpenSUSE Kalpa 81 upvotes, 45 comments
  25. A proposal to classify happiness as a psychiatric disorder (1992) 134 upvotes, 83 comments
  26. Show HN: Crust – A CLI framework for TypeScript and Bun 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  27. Heart, Head, Life, Fate 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Node.js needs a virtual file system 101 upvotes, 89 comments
  29. The American Healthcare Conundrum 481 upvotes, 533 comments
  30. Spice Data (YC S19) Is Hiring a Product Specialist 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 18 March 2026. Source here.
